      <div class="copy-block">
        <p class="eyebrow">Privacy</p>
        <h1 class="page-title">Privacy note</h1>
        <p>This site is a simple public author website. It does not currently provide reader accounts, contact forms, newsletter sign-ups, or on-site comments.</p>
        <p>No direct personal details are requested from visitors through the site itself at this stage.</p>
        <p>If that changes later, this page should be updated to reflect the live site accurately.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
